aniva.title: Маяк Анива
aniva.subtitle: Легендарный маяк на скале в открытом море
aniva.prompt:
Photorealistic photo editing: place the person from image 1 into the base scene from image 3. Preserve their recognisable facial features, gender, hairstyle, skin tone and overall appearance. Match their natural body build from image 2.
Keep the background, camera angle, framing, perspective and composition of image 3 unchanged. Show the person FULL-LENGTH from head to shoes, standing on the rocks in the foreground at a believable scale, with correct natural human proportions — the head about one-seventh to one-eighth of the total height, never enlarged. The person is FULLY CLOTHED, wearing: {OUTFIT}. Use a relaxed, confident pose and a friendly, natural expression. EYES: both eyes symmetric, fully open, correct natural almond shape with clearly defined eyelids, iris and pupil, looking straight at the camera; never squinting, half-closed, uneven, cross-eyed or melted. MOUTH: lips closed in a light natural smile, well-formed, symmetric and sharply defined with a clean lip outline; never smeared, chewed, doubled, wavy, warped or blurred.
Match the scene’s lighting, shadows, depth, colours and atmosphere. Keep the face softly and evenly lit.
The ENTIRE image must read as a REAL PHOTOGRAPH, never a 3D render, game engine shot or illustration. The lighthouse, its stonework, the rocks and the sea keep authentic weathered texture — cracks, rust stains, chipped concrete, lichen, rough granite, real sea foam — with natural photographic grain, micro-contrast and true-to-life colour. Absolutely no cartoon, CGI, plastic, over-smoothed or over-saturated look. Keep the exact camera angle, framing and composition of image 3 unchanged. Ultra-realistic professional DSLR quality, sharp focus, natural skin texture, correct anatomy and seamless blending. Remove tattoos and blemishes. No nudity, no bare torso, no text, logos, extra people, background changes, blur, distortion, plastic skin, AI artifacts or cut-out appearance.

tikhaya.title: Бухта Тихая
tikhaya.subtitle: Хребты и залив у подножия гор
tikhaya.prompt: Place the PERSON from the portrait photorealistically at Tikhaya Bay on Sakhalin — a calm sea inlet at the foot of steep green-grey mountain ridges, pebble shoreline. Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

velikan.title: Мыс Великан
velikan.subtitle: Каменные арки и кекуры Охотского моря
velikan.prompt: Place the PERSON from the portrait photorealistically at Cape Velikan on Sakhalin — spectacular sea stacks and natural rock arches rising from the turquoise Sea of Okhotsk. Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

chertov_most.title: Чёртов мост
chertov_most.subtitle: Инженерное чудо Сахалинской железной дороги

Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

klokovsky.title: Клоковский водопад
klokovsky.subtitle: Падающая вода у берега моря
klokovsky.prompt: Place the PERSON from the portrait photorealistically at Klokovsky Waterfall on Sakhalin — a wide waterfall cascading down a rocky ledge toward the sea shore, wet rocks, lush greenery and mist. Preserve their identity exactly. Vertical DSLR travel photo. No text, logos, frames, extra people or distortions.

spg_prigorodnoe.title: СПГ. Пригородное
spg_prigorodnoe.subtitle: Время для созидания и гармонии
spg_prigorodnoe.prompt:
Photorealistic photo editing: place the person from image 1 into the base scene from image 3. Preserve their recognisable facial features, gender, hairstyle, skin tone and overall appearance. Match their natural body build from image 2.
Image 3 is the BASE photograph: the Prigorodnoye LNG plant on Sakhalin — a tall flare stack with a burning flame and dark smoke, industrial buildings, green hills and mountains under a heavy overcast sky, wide asphalt area in the foreground. Keep this background, camera angle, framing, perspective and composition unchanged. Place the person standing on the asphalt in the right foreground, shown from mid-thigh up at a believable scale, with correct natural human proportions and the head never enlarged; the flare stack stays clearly visible on the left behind them.
The person is FULLY CLOTHED in a plain clean white hoodie and a white baseball cap. Relaxed confident pose, hands in the hoodie pocket, calm friendly expression. EYES: both eyes symmetric, fully open, correct natural shape with defined eyelids, iris and pupil; never squinting, uneven or melted. MOUTH: lips closed in a light natural expression, well-formed, symmetric, sharply defined; never smeared, chewed, doubled or warped.
Match the scene lighting exactly: soft diffused overcast daylight, cool muted colours, moody grey sky, no harsh shadows; keep the face evenly lit.
The ENTIRE image must read as a REAL DOCUMENTARY PHOTOGRAPH, never a 3D render or illustration: authentic industrial metal and concrete texture, real grass and rock, natural photographic grain and micro-contrast. Ultra-realistic professional DSLR quality, sharp focus, natural skin texture, correct anatomy and seamless blending. Remove tattoos and blemishes. No nudity, no text, no logos or lettering on clothing, no extra people, no background changes, no blur, distortion, plastic skin, AI artifacts or cut-out appearance.
